rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH GARZA et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS(B P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights And Restraining Order [Goldfein Joseph]
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, January 26, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion for assignment of rights and restraining order [Goldfein & Joseph] is granted. The assignment sought is permitted by CCP 708.510(a). The hearing on this motion will occur at 9:30am, not 9 a.m. = (220/HEK)
